query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s1.externalId) AS safe_to_merge
FROM services s1
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId)
  AND (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s2.externalId) FROM services s2
    WHERE s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
      AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
      AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
  ) = 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s1.externalId) AS safe_to_merge
FROM services s1
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId)
  AND (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s2.externalId) FROM services s2
    WHERE s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId
      AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
      AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
  ) = 1;
